migrations.description: Composer agent mode and enhanced context

steps.title: Enable Composer agent mode
steps.after:
# Open Composer (Cmd+Shift+I)
# Enable 'Agent' mode in Composer settings
steps.notes: Agent mode allows multi-file edits with minimal supervision

steps.title: Configure .cursorrules
steps.after:
# .cursorrules
Use Bun instead of npm
Prefer Tailwind utility classes
Always write tests for new features
steps.notes: Cursor reads .cursorrules automatically on project load

steps.notes: GPT-4o is faster and more capable than Turbo
